description: resolve returns the ip or ''; build_request returns the HTTP request line; reassemble joins the packets; load_page runs all three in order and returns [ip, request, page].
load_page calls the other three functions (it does not re-implement them) and reports each step's result; a name that won't resolve yields ['', request, page] so the journey breaks at DNS.
The conductor reuses the steps rather than duplicating logic; clear variable names (ip, request, page); a return on every path.
